title: Kichakeshwari Temple
tagline: Kichakeshwari Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Kichakeshwari Temple (Odia: କୀଚକେଶ୍ଵରୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is temple of Hindu Goddess Chamunda alias Kali located in Khiching, which was the ancient capital of the Bhanja rulers, located about
overview.description: Kichakeshwari Temple (Odia: କୀଚକେଶ୍ଵରୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is temple of Hindu Goddess Chamunda alias Kali located in Khiching, which was the ancient capital of the Bhanja rulers, located about 205 km from Balasore and 150 km from Baripada in the Mayurbhanj district of north Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Khuntapada
topPlaces.description: Khuntapada is a village located in Jhumpura Block of Kendujhar district in Odisha, India. The village has a population of 1293 of which 650 are males while 643 are females as per the Population Census 2011.

topPlaces.name: Badaghagara Waterfall
topPlaces.description: The Badaghagara Waterfall is a waterfall of the Kendujhar district in the Indian state of Odisha.

items.note: Khuntapada is a village located in Jhumpura Block of Kendujhar district in Odisha, India. The village has a population of 1293 of which 650 are males while 643 are females as per the Population Census 2011.
The Badaghagara Waterfall is a waterfall of the Kendujhar district in the Indian state of Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kichakeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kichakeshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kichakeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (149 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (148 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kichakeshwari Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kichakeshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kichakeshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kichakeshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kichakeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khuntapada, Badaghagara Waterfall.
